pi_items.source: Task description explicitly dictates this file path as the required location for the saved experiment.
Task description explicitly dictates this file path as the required location for the conditions file.
Task description explicitly requires creating a conditions file with an "ioi" column containing the rows 0.4 and 0.6.
Task description explicitly requires the Inner Loop ("pacing") to repeat at least 10 times (nReps=10).

privileged_info_summary: The task requires the agent to build a PsychoPy experiment from scratch. The metadata values perfectly match the explicit requirements listed in the task description: the experiment file must be saved to "/home/ga/PsychoPyExperiments/tapping/sync_continuation.psyexp", the conditions file must be saved to "/home/ga/PsychoPyExperiments/tapping/conditions.csv" with "ioi" values of [0.4, 0.6], and the inner pacing loop must be set to at least 10 repetitions.
